title: Infant Care
description: Gentle, responsive care for your youngest ones in a safe, warm and sensory-rich environment. Every baby grows at their own pace — we celebrate each milestone together.
highlights: Dedicated primary caregiver for each infant
Sensory play and tummy time activities
Language development through songs and stories
Safe sleep and feeding routines respected
Daily written and app-based parent updates
Introduction to basic self-help and independence

title: Playgroup
description: Our Playgroup programme is designed for toddlers taking their first steps into a structured learning environment. The focus is on developing basic social skills, language acquisition, and motor skills through guided play and exploration.
highlights: Gentle separation from parents and school adaptation
Fine and gross motor skill activities

title: Nursery
description: The Nursery programme builds on the Playgroup foundation, introducing more structured learning activities while continuing to emphasise play-based exploration. Children develop greater independence and engage in collaborative activities.
highlights: Physical activities for coordination and balance
Basic concept formation and cognitive skills

title: Junior KG
description: Our Junior KG programme introduces a more structured curriculum while maintaining a balance with play-based learning. Children develop academic readiness skills and engage in more complex cognitive activities.
highlights: Introduction to alphabet recognition and phonics
Number concepts and basic mathematical operations
Enhanced fine motor skills for writing readiness

title: Senior KG
description: The Senior KG programme prepares children for a smooth transition to primary school. The curriculum focuses on strong foundational skills in literacy, numeracy, and other key learning areas while fostering independence and confidence.
highlights: Advanced number concepts and mathematical skills
Enhanced social skills and emotional regulation
School readiness skills and study habits

title: Full-Day Daycare
description: Our comprehensive daycare programme provides all-day care for preschool-aged children, combining educational activities with play, rest, and meals in a structured daily routine perfect for working parents.
highlights: Extended hours from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM
Quiet rest periods during the day

title: After-School Program
description: Our after-school programme provides a supportive environment for school-aged children to complete homework, engage in enrichment activities, and enjoy supervised recreation after regular school hours.
highlights: School pickup from selected nearby schools
Indoor and outdoor games and recreation

title: Holiday Camps
description: During school holidays and breaks, we offer special camp programmes filled with fun activities, field trips, and themed projects to keep children engaged and entertained.
highlights: Local field trips and special guests
Available during Summer, Diwali and Winter breaks
